title: Automated API Client Code Generation
scenario: Generate a client-side API code in JavaScript that consumes a RESTful API and retrieves a list of users. The output should be a well-structured and complete JavaScript code with proper formatting.
constraints: Must include a get request to the API endpoint.
Must include a console.log statement to display the response.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the JavaScript code is valid and properly formatted.
Check if the code correctly retrieves the list of users.
Verify that the output meets all specified constraints.
